updater.downloadingDesc: A new version is currently downloading in the background. You can continue learning.
updater.readyDesc: The new version has been downloaded. Restart the application to install it.
updater.macAvailableDesc: Download the latest version directly from GitHub to enjoy the new features.

home.title: Testownik
home.subtitle: An application for learning and taking tests.
home.dragDrop: Drag and drop a .zip file here
home.orClick: or click to select from disk
home.errorEmptyZip: No questions found in the file. Ensure the archive contains .txt files in the correct format.
home.autoSaveNotice: Progress is automatically saved — you can pause and continue at any time.
home.savedTestsNotice: Resume a test or start over with the same question database.

repeatOptions.opt1Desc: Each question is passed after 1 correct answer.
repeatOptions.opt2Desc: Each question requires 2 correct answers in a row.
repeatOptions.opt3Desc: Each question requires 3 correct answers in a row.

sessionsList.emptyStateSub: Create a new test to start.
sessionsList.editWarning: Editing in creator will overwrite the test with a new version (current progress will be reset). Continue?
sessionsList.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this test?
sessionsList.restartModalDesc: Current progress in this test will be lost. Select the required number of correct answers in a row to pass a question:

summary.beerModalDesc: Congratulations, great job! You fully deserve a cold beer.
summary.testFinishedDesc: Congratulations! You correctly answered all {{count}} questions.
summary.clickToSee: — click to see the correct answer

creator.errorNoQuestions: No valid questions found in this ZIP archive.
creator.quitWarning: Are you sure you want to leave the creator? Any unsaved changes will be lost permanently.
creator.title: Question Database Creator
creator.uploadClickOrDrag: Click to upload image or drag file here
creator.selectOrCreate: Select a question from the list or create a new one.
creator.saveModalDesc: Enter the name you want to save this question database under in your tests.

test.skipped: Skipped. Question will return to queue.
test.wrongAnswerPrefix: Wrong answer. Question will return to queue and will require
test.hoverToReveal: Hover with mouse to reveal answer...

formatInfo.title: File Format
formatInfo.description: Testownik supports questions in plain text format (.txt). Each file represents one question. The file structure should look like this:
formatInfo.line1Desc: Consists of a category letter (e.g. X) and a sequence of zeros and ones. 1 means correct answer, 0 means wrong. E.g. X0100 means the second answer is correct.
formatInfo.line2Desc: The text of the question. You can embed an image here using the [img]filename.png[/img] tag.
formatInfo.line3Desc: Each subsequent line is an answer variant. Their count must match the length of the binary mask (zeros and ones).
